title: NEW DAY - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH NEW DAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports the safety, needs, and rights of people experiencing sex trafficking or exploitation, trading sex, or who are at risk. Provides case outreach, case management/advocacy, and counseling. Helps with safety planning, transportation, and access to shelter or other housing resources. Also offers referral to additional resources, access to employment and education programs, and LGBTQ2+ resources. 314 SW 9th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 12-25 who have been impacted by sex trafficking Hours: Referral Line: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm Hotline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 258-7081 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 224-4339 Main phone Main phone (503) 258-7081 Call or text Hotline (503) 235-5333 Call to Safety Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or email for more information. Referrals can be made by self or provider. Calls will be returned within two business days. Hotline is through Call to Safety. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Case/Care Management * Sex Trafficking Victims General Clothing Provision * Sex Trafficking Victims Human Trafficking Hotlines Mentoring Programs * Sex Trafficking Victims Personal/Grooming Supplies * Sex Trafficking Victims Transitional Housing/Shelter * Sex Trafficking Victims Youth Employment Programs * Sex Trafficking Victims Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - PROMOTING AVENUES TO EMPLOYMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
